We can’t do this\n // for a comparator (except for specific, known comparators) because we can’t\n // tell if the comparator is symmetric, and an asymmetric comparator can’t be\n // used to test whether a single value is comparable.\n if (f.length !== 2) {\n compare1 = ascending;\n compare2 = (d, x) => ascending(f(d), x);\n delta = (d, x) => f(d) - x;\n } else {\n compare1 = f === ascending || f === descending ? f : zero;\n compare2 = f;\n delta = f;\n }\n\n function left(a, x, lo = 0, hi = a.length) {\n if (lo < hi) {\n if (compare1(x, x) !== 0) return hi;\n do {\n const mid = (lo + hi) >>> 1;\n if (compare2(a[mid], x) < 0) lo = mid + 1;\n else hi = mid;\n } while (lo < hi);\n }\n return lo;\n }\n\n function right(a, x, lo = 0, hi = a.length) {\n if (lo < hi) {\n if (compare1(x, x) !== 0) return hi;\n do {\n const mid = (lo + hi) >>> 1;\n if (compare2(a[mid], x) <= 0) lo = mid + 1;\n else hi = mid;\n } while (lo < hi);\n }\n return lo;\n }\n\n function center(a, x, lo = 0, hi = a.length) {\n const i = left(a, x, lo, hi - 1);\n return i > lo && delta(a[i - 1], x) > -delta(a[i], x) ? i - 1 : i;\n }\n\n return {left, center, right};\n}\n\nfunction zero() {\n return 0;\n}\n","export default function number(x) {\n return x === null ? NaN : +x;\n}\n\nexport function* numbers(values, valueof) {\n if (valueof === undefined) {\n for (let value of values) {\n if (value != null && (value = +value) >= value) {\n yield value;\n }\n }\n } else {\n let index = -1;\n for (let value of values) {\n if ((value = valueof(value, ++index, values)) != null && (value = +value) >= value) {\n yield value;\n }\n }\n }\n}\n","import ascending from \"./ascending.js\";\nimport bisector from \"./bisector.js\";\nimport number from \"./number.js\";\n\nconst ascendingBisect = bisector(ascending);\nexport const bisectRight = ascendingBisect.right;\nexport const bisectLeft = ascendingBisect.left;\nexport const bisectCenter = bisector(number).center;\nexport default bisectRight;\n","export function blur(values, r) {\n if (!((r = +r) >= 0)) throw new RangeError(\"invalid r\");\n let length = values.length;\n if (!((length = Math.floor(length)) >= 0)) throw new RangeError(\"invalid length\");\n if (!length || !r) return values;\n const blur = blurf(r);\n const temp = values.slice();\n blur(values, temp, 0, length, 1);\n blur(temp, values, 0, length, 1);\n blur(values, temp, 0, length, 1);\n return values;\n}\n\nexport const blur2 = Blur2(blurf);\n\nexport const blurImage = Blur2(blurfImage);\n\nfunction Blur2(blur) {\n return function(data, rx, ry = rx) {\n if (!((rx = +rx) >= 0)) throw new RangeError(\"invalid rx\");\n if (!((ry = +ry) >= 0)) throw new RangeError(\"invalid ry\");\n let {data: values, width, height} = data;\n if (!((width = Math.floor(width)) >= 0)) throw new RangeError(\"invalid width\");\n if (!((height = Math.floor(height !== undefined ?  shortMonths: ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"]
});

export default function defaultLocale(definition) {
 locale = formatLocale(definition);
 timeFormat = locale.format;
 timeParse = locale.parse;
 utcFormat = locale.utcFormat;
 utcParse = locale.utcParse;
 return locale;
}
","import {utcFormat} from "./defaultLocale.js";

export var isoSpecifier = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%LZ";

function formatIsoNative(date) {
 return date.toISOString();
}

var formatIso = Date.prototype.toISOString
 ? formatIsoNative
 : utcFormat(isoSpecifier);

export default formatIso;
","import {isoSpecifier} from "./isoFormat.js";
import {utcParse} from "./defaultLocale.js";

function parseIsoNative(string) {
 var date = new Date(string);
 return isNaN(date) ? null : date;
}

var parseIso = +new Date("2000-01-01T00:00:00.000Z")
 ? parseIsoNative
 : utcParse(isoSpecifier);

export default parseIso;

export default function piecewise(interpolate, values) {

				} });","import {cubehelix} from "d3-color";
import {interpolateCubehelixLong} from "d3-interpolate";

export default interpolateCubehelixLong(cubehelix(300, 0.5, 0.0), cubehelix(-240, 0.5, 1.0));
","import {cubehelix} from "d3-color";
import {interpolateCubehelixLong} from "d3-interpolate";

export var warm = interpolateCubehelixLong(cubehelix(-100, 0.75, 0.35), cubehelix(80, 1.50, 0.8));

export var cool = interpolateCubehelixLong(cubehelix(260, 0.75, 0.35), cubehelix(80, 1.50, 0.8));

var c = cubehelix();

export default function(t) {
 if (t < 0 || t > 1) t -= Math.floor(t);
 var ts = Math.abs(t - 0.5);
 c.h = 360 * t - 100;
 c.s = 1.5 - 1.5 * ts;
 c.l = 0.8 - 0.9 * ts;
 return c + "";
}
","import {rgb} from "d3-color";

var c = rgb(),
 pi_1_3 = Math.PI / 3,
 pi_2_3 = Math.PI * 2 / 3;

export default function(t) {
 var x;
 t = (0.5 - t) * Math.PI;
 c.r = 255 * (x = Math.sin(t)) * x;
 c.g = 255 * (x = Math.sin(t + pi_1_3)) * x;
 c.b = 255 * (x = Math.sin(t + pi_2_3)) * x;
 return c + "";
}
","export default function(t) {
 t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t));
 return "rgb("

 + Math.max(0, Math.min(255, Math.round(27.2 + t * (3211.1 - t * (15327.97 - t * (27814 - t * (22569.18 - t * 6838.66)))))))
 + ")";
}
","import colors from "../colors.js";

function ramp(range) {
 var n = range.length;
 return function(t) {
 return range[Math.max(0, Math.min(n - 1, Math.floor(t * n)))];
 };
}

export default ramp(colors(""));

export var magma = ramp(colors(""));

export var inferno = ramp(colors(""));

export var plasma = ramp(colors(""));

The require scope
var __webpack_require__ = {};

","// define getter functions for harmony exports
__webpack_require__.d = (exports, definition) => {
	for(var key in definition) {
		if(__webpack_require__.o(definition, key) && !__webpack_require__.o(exports, key)) {
			Object.defineProperty(exports, key, { enumerable: true, get: definition[key] });
		}
	}
};","__webpack_require__.o = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop))","export const linear = t => +t;
","export function quadIn(t) {
 return t * t;
}

export function quadOut(t) {
 return t * (2 - t);
}

export function quadInOut(t) {
 return ((t *= 2) <= 1 ? t * t : --t * (2 - t) + 1) / 2;
}
","export function cubicIn(t) {
 return t * t * t;
}

export function cubicOut(t) {
 return --t * t * t + 1;
}

export function cubicInOut(t) {
 return ((t *= 2) <= 1 ? t * t * t : (t -= 2) * t * t + 2) / 2;
}
","var exponent = 3;

export var polyIn = (function custom(e) {
 e = +e;

 function polyIn(t) {
 return Math.pow(t, e);
 }

 polyIn.exponent = custom;

 return polyIn;
})(exponent);

export var polyOut = (function custom(e) {
 e = +e;

 function polyOut(t) {
 return 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, e);
 }

 polyOut.exponent = custom;

 return polyOut;
})(exponent);

export var polyInOut = (function custom(e) {
 e = +e;

 function polyInOut(t) {
 return ((t *= 2) <= 1 ? Math.pow(t, e) : 2 - Math.pow(2 - t, e)) / 2;
 }

 polyInOut.exponent = custom;

 return polyInOut;
})(exponent);
","var pi = Math.PI,
 halfPi = pi / 2;

export function sinIn(t) {
 return (+t === 1) ? 1 : 1 - Math.cos(t * halfPi);
}

export function sinOut(t) {
 return Math.sin(t * halfPi);
}

export function sinInOut(t) {
 return (1 - Math.cos(pi * t)) / 2;
}
","// tpmt is two power minus ten times t scaled to [0,1]
export function tpmt(x) {
 return (Math.pow(2, -10 * x) - 0.0009765625) * 1.0009775171065494;
}
","import {tpmt} from "./math.js";

export function expIn(t) {
 return tpmt(1 - +t);
}

export function expOut(t) {
 return 1 - tpmt(t);
}

export function expInOut(t) {
 return ((t *= 2) <= 1 ? tpmt(1 - t) : 2 - tpmt(t - 1)) / 2;
}
","export function circleIn(t) {
 return 1 - Math.sqrt(1 - t * t);
}

export function circleOut(t) {
 return Math.sqrt(1 - --t * t);
}

export function circleInOut(t) {
 return ((t *= 2) <= 1 ? 1 - Math.sqrt(1 - t * t) : Math.sqrt(1 - (t -= 2) * t) + 1) / 2;
}

 b3 = 8 / 11,

 b5 = 9 / 11,
 b6 = 10 / 11,

 b8 = 21 / 22,
 b9 = 63 / 64,

 return 1 - bounceOut(1 - t);
}

","// define getter functions for harmony exports
__webpack_require__.d = (exports, definition) => {
	for(var key in definition) {
		if(__webpack_require__.o(definition, key) && !__webpack_require__.o(exports, key)) {

};","__webpack_require__.o = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop))","export default function(x) {
 return Math.abs(x = Math.round(x)) >= 1e21
 ? x.toLocaleString("en").replace(/,/g, "")
 : x.toString(10);
}

// Computes the decimal coefficient and exponent of the specified number x with
// significant digits p, where x is positive and p is in [1, 21] or undefined.
// For example, formatDecimalParts(1.23) returns ["123", 0].
export function formatDecimalParts(x, p) {
 if (!isFinite(x) || x === 0) return null; // NaN, ±Infinity, ±0
 var i = (x = p ? x.toExponential(p - 1) : x.toExponential()).indexOf("e"), coefficient = x.slice(0, i);

 // The string returned by toExponential either has the form \d\.\d+e[-+]\d+
 // (e.g., 1.2e+3) or the form \de[-+]\d+ (e.g., 1e+3).
 return [
 coefficient.length > 1 ? coefficient[0] + coefficient.slice(2) : coefficient,
 +x.slice(i + 1)
 ];
}
","import {formatDecimalParts} from "./formatDecimal.js";

export default function(x) {
 return x = formatDecimalParts(Math.abs(x)), x ? x[1] : NaN;
}
","// [[fill]align][sign][symbol][0][width][,][.precision][~][type]
var re = /^(?:(.)?([<>=^]))?([+\-( ])?([$#])?(0)?(\d+)?(,)?(\.\d+)?(~)?([a-z%])?$/i;

export default function formatSpecifier(specifier) {
 if (!(match = re.exec(specifier))) throw new Error("invalid format: " + specifier);
 var match;
 return new FormatSpecifier({
 fill: match[1],
 align: match[2],
 sign: match[3],
 symbol: match[4],
 zero: match[5],
 width: match[6],
 comma: match[7],
 precision: match[8] && match[8].slice(1),
 trim: match[9],
 type: match[10]
 });
}

formatSpecifier.prototype = FormatSpecifier.prototype; // instanceof

export function FormatSpecifier(specifier) {
 this.fill = specifier.fill === undefined ? " " : specifier.fill + "";
 this.align = specifier.align === undefined ? ">" : specifier.align + "";
 this.sign = specifier.sign === undefined ? "-" : specifier.sign + "";
 this.symbol = specifier.symbol === undefined ? "" : specifier.symbol + "";
 this.zero = !!specifier.zero;
 this.width = specifier.width === undefined ? undefined : +specifier.width;
 this.comma = !!specifier.comma;
 this.precision = specifier.precision === undefined ? undefined : +specifier.precision;
 this.trim = !!specifier.trim;
 this.type = specifier.type === undefined ? "" : specifier.type + "";
}

FormatSpecifier.prototype.toString = function() {
 return this.fill
 + this.align
 + this.sign
 + this.symbol
 + (this.zero ? "0" : "")
 + (this.width === undefined ? "" : Math.max(1, this.width | 0))
 + (this.comma ? "," : "")
 + (this.precision === undefined ? "" : "." + Math.max(0, this.precision | 0))
 + (this.trim ? "~" : "")
 + this.type;
};
","import {formatDecimalParts} from "./formatDecimal.js";

export var prefixExponent;

export default function(x, p) {
 var d = formatDecimalParts(x, p);
 if (!d) return prefixExponent = undefined, x.toPrecision(p);
 var coefficient = d[0],
 exponent = d[1],
 i = exponent - (prefixExponent = Math.max(-8, Math.min(8, Math.floor(exponent / 3))) * 3) + 1,
 n = coefficient.length;
 return i === n ? coefficient
 : i > n ? coefficient + new Array(i - n + 1).join("0")
 : i > 0 ? coefficient.slice(0, i) + "." + coefficient.slice(i)
 : "0." + new Array(1 - i).join("0") + formatDecimalParts(x, Math.max(0, p + i - 1))[0]; // less than 1y!
}
","import {formatDecimalParts} from "./formatDecimal.js";

export default function(x, p) {
 var d = formatDecimalParts(x, p);
 if (!d) return x + "";
 var coefficient = d[0],
 exponent = d[1];
 return exponent < 0 ? "0." + new Array(-exponent).join("0") + coefficient
 : coefficient.length > exponent + 1 ? coefficient.slice(0, exponent + 1) + "." + coefficient.slice(exponent + 1)
 : coefficient + new Array(exponent - coefficient.length + 2).join("0");
}
","import formatDecimal from "./formatDecimal.js";
import formatPrefixAuto from "./formatPrefixAuto.js";
import formatRounded from "./formatRounded.js";

export default {
 "%": (x, p) => (x * 100).toFixed(p),
 "b": (x) => Math.round(x).toString(2),
 "c": (x) => x + "",
 "d": formatDecimal,
 "e": (x, p) => x.toExponential(p),
 "f": (x, p) => x.toFixed(p),
 "g": (x, p) => x.toPrecision(p),
 "o": (x) => Math.round(x).toString(8),
 "p": (x, p) => formatRounded(x * 100, p),
 "r": formatRounded,
 "s": formatPrefixAuto,
 "X": (x) => Math.round(x).toString(16).toUpperCase(),
 "x": (x) => Math.round(x).toString(16)
};
","export default function(x) {
 return x;
}
","import exponent from "./exponent.js";
import formatGroup from "./formatGroup.js";
import formatNumerals from "./formatNumerals.js";
import formatSpecifier from "./formatSpecifier.js";
import formatTrim from "./formatTrim.js";
import formatTypes from "./formatTypes.js";
import {prefixExponent} from "./formatPrefixAuto.js";
import identity from "./identity.js";

var map = Array.prototype.map,
 prefixes = ["y","z","a","f","p","n","µ","m","","k","M","G","T","P","E","Z","Y"];

export default function(locale) {
 var group = locale.grouping === undefined || locale.thousands === undefined ? identity : formatGroup(map.call(locale.grouping, Number), locale.thousands + ""),
 currencyPrefix = locale.currency === undefined ? "" : locale.currency[0] + "",
 currencySuffix = locale.currency === undefined ? "" : locale.currency[1] + "",
 decimal = locale.decimal === undefined ? "." : locale.decimal + "",
 numerals = locale.numerals === undefined ? identity : formatNumerals(map.call(locale.numerals, String)),
 percent = locale.percent === undefined ? "%" : locale.percent + "",

It owns\n * the SVG subtree imperatively while the Seismic/snabbdom view only provides the\n * stable host container. Re-rendering on each property change keeps the\n * look-and-feel fully driven by the UI Builder property panel.\n *\n * We import the specific d3 functions we use as NAMED imports (rather than\n * `import * as d3`): the ServiceNow production build tree-shakes a namespace\n * object that's passed around, which would strip methods like `select`.\n *\n * dispatch(actionName, payload) emits the custom actions declared in now-ui.json\n * (CHART_CLICKED / COLUMN_CLICKED / COLUMN_HOVERED) so page authors can hook\n * them as event handlers in UI Builder.\n */\nimport { select } from 'd3-selection';\nimport { scaleBand, scaleLinear, scaleLog, scaleSqrt } from 'd3-scale';\nimport {\n\tschemeCategory10, schemeTableau10, schemeSet2, schemeSet3,\n\tschemePaired, schemeDark2, schemePastel1, schemeAccent\n} from 'd3-scale-chromatic';\nimport { axisBottom, axisLeft } from 'd3-axis';\nimport { format } from 'd3-format';\nimport { color } from 'd3-color';\nimport {\n\teaseLinear, easeCubicOut, easeCubicInOut, easeQuadOut,\n\teaseExpOut, easeBackOut, easeBounceOut, easeElasticOut\n} from 'd3-ease';\n\n// Named categorical schemes selectable via the `colorScheme` property. sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_event_995a17afc923a6b94217bdb7672d2183
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update> <sys_ux_event action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <event_name>CHART_CLICKED</event_name> <label>Chart clicked</label> <description>Fired when the user clicks anywhere on the chart (not on a specific column).</description> <props>[{"name":"seriesCount","label":"Number of series","description":"How many series are currently rendered.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"categoryCount","label":"Number of categories","description":"How many categories (x-axis groups) are rendered.","valueType":"string"}]</props> <interfaces>[]</interfaces> <sys_id>995a17afc923a6b94217bdb7672d2183</sys_id> <sys_package>5e1851663e5ec33d6a2d7c4fd0657c1b</sys_package> <sys_scope>5e1851663e5ec33d6a2d7c4fd0657c1b</sys_scope> <api_name/> <schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version> <sys_name/> <sys_created_by>tectonic</sys_created_by> <sys_policy/> <sys_updated_by>tectonic</sys_updated_by> <sys_class_name>sys_ux_event</sys_class_name> <sys_update_name>sys_ux_event_995a17afc923a6b94217bdb7672d2183</sys_update_name> </sys_ux_event> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_event_1afa1c5e09de6445c23be1df20c29c09
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update> <sys_ux_event action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <event_name>COLUMN_CLICKED</event_name> <label>Column clicked</label> <description>Fired when the user clicks an individual column. Use to drill into details for that data point.</description> <props>[{"name":"seriesName","label":"Series name","description":"Name of the series the column belongs to.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"label","label":"Category label","description":"The category (x-axis) label of the column.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"value","label":"Value","description":"The numeric value of the column.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"seriesIndex","label":"Series index","description":"Zero-based index of the series.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"categoryIndex","label":"Category index","description":"Zero-based index of the category.","valueType":"string"}]</props> <interfaces>[]</interfaces> <sys_id>1afa1c5e09de6445c23be1df20c29c09</sys_id> <sys_package>5e1851663e5ec33d6a2d7c4fd0657c1b</sys_package> <sys_scope>5e1851663e5ec33d6a2d7c4fd0657c1b</sys_scope> <api_name/> <schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version> <sys_name/> <sys_created_by>tectonic</sys_created_by> <sys_policy/> <sys_updated_by>tectonic</sys_updated_by> <sys_class_name>sys_ux_event</sys_class_name> <sys_update_name>sys_ux_event_1afa1c5e09de6445c23be1df20c29c09</sys_update_name> </sys_ux_event> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_event_c64d809fe09edad03850be2123082623
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update> <sys_ux_event action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <event_name>COLUMN_HOVERED</event_name> <label>Column hovered</label> <description>Fired when the user hovers a column. Useful for syncing external tooltips or details panels.</description> <props>[{"name":"seriesName","label":"Series name","description":"Name of the series the column belongs to.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"label","label":"Category label","description":"The category (x-axis) label of the column.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"value","label":"Value","description":"The numeric value of the column.","valueType":"string"}]</props> <interfaces>[]</interfaces> <sys_id>c64d809fe09edad03850be2123082623</sys_id> <sys_package>5e1851663e5ec33d6a2d7c4fd0657c1b</sys_package> <sys_scope>5e1851663e5ec33d6a2d7c4fd0657c1b</sys_scope> <api_name/> <schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version> <sys_name/> <sys_created_by>tectonic</sys_created_by> <sys_policy/> <sys_updated_by>tectonic</sys_updated_by> <sys_class_name>sys_ux_event</sys_class_name> <sys_update_name>sys_ux_event_c64d809fe09edad03850be2123082623</sys_update_name> </sys_ux_event> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_macroponent_f82c71bfc13d342f6c92f297a01fc64c
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update> <sys_ux_macroponent action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <name>D3 Column Chart</name> <props>[{"name":"series","label":"Data · Series data","fieldType":"json","description":"Array of series, each: { name, color, data: [ { label, value } ] }. Categories come from the first series' labels. Bind to a data resource or leave empty to show built-in sample data.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"groupMode","label":"Data · Column grouping","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"Grouped (side by side)","value":"grouped"},{"label":"Stacked","value":"stacked"}]},"defaultValue":"grouped","description":"How multiple series are laid out.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"orientation","label":"Data · Orientation","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"Vertical (columns)","value":"vertical"},{"label":"Horizontal (bars)","value":"horizontal"}]},"defaultValue":"vertical","description":"Draw vertical columns or horizontal bars. Horizontal is better for long category labels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"stackOffset","label":"Data · Stack offset","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"None","value":"none"},{"label":"100% (expand)","value":"expand"},{"label":"Diverging (+/-)","value":"diverging"}]},"defaultValue":"none","description":"Only applies when Column grouping is Stacked. None = raw totals; 100% = every column normalized to full height (y-axis shows %); Diverging = negatives drop below the zero line, positives rise above.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"chartTitle","label":"Header & border · Title","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"Tickets by Month","description":"Title rendered above the chart. Leave blank to hide.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"titleFontSize","label":"Header & border · Title font size","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":18,"description":"Font size of the chart title, in pixels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"titleColor","label":"Header & border · Title color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"#374151","description":"Text color of the chart title.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"componentWidth","label":"Header & border · Width","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"50%","description":"Outer width of the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. \"50%\", \"640px\". A bare number is treated as pixels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"componentPadding","label":"Header & border · Padding","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"12px","description":"Padding around the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. \"12px\", \"1rem\". A bare number is treated as pixels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"backgroundColor","label":"Header & border · Background color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"transparent","description":"Chart background. CSS color or \"transparent\".","valueType":"string"},{"name":"borderColor","label":"Header & border · Border color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"Border color of the widget. Leave blank for no border.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"borderWidth","label":"Header & border · Border width","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":0,"description":"Border thickness in pixels. 0 = no border.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"borderRadius","label":"Header & border · Border radius","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":0,"description":"Rounded corners of the widget, in pixels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"chartHeight","label":"Display · Chart height (px)","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":360,"description":"Height of the chart in pixels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"columnPadding","label":"Display · Column padding","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":0.2,"description":"Gap between columns/groups as a fraction of band width (0 = touching, 0.9 = thin). Range 0-0.95.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"groupPadding","label":"Display · Inner group padding (grouped only)","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":0.05,"description":"For grouped mode: gap between bars within a group, as a fraction (0-0.5).","valueType":"string"},{"name":"bar3D","label":"Display · 3D columns","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Render columns as extruded 3D bars (with lit top and shaded side faces).","valueType":"string"},{"name":"depth3D","label":"Display · 3D depth (when 3D on)","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":10,"description":"Extrusion depth of the 3D effect, in pixels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"cornerRadius","label":"Display · Corner radius (2D only)","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":4,"description":"Rounded top corners of each column, in pixels. Applies in flat (2D) mode only.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"barCornerRadius3D","label":"Display · Rounded corners in 3D","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"description":"Apply the corner radius to the column fronts even in 3D mode (off = square 3D fronts). Needs Corner radius > 0.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"barOpacity","label":"Display · Bar opacity","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":1,"description":"Fill opacity of the columns from 0 (transparent) to 1 (solid).","valueType":"string"},{"name":"minBarHeight","label":"Display · Minimum bar size (px)","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":0,"description":"Pixel floor so tiny non-zero values stay visible and clickable. Applies to grouped mode. 0 = off.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"dropShadow","label":"Display · Drop shadow","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Apply a soft drop shadow to the columns.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"shadowColor","label":"Display · Shadow color (when drop shadow on)","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"rgba(0,0,0,0.25)","description":"Color of the column drop shadow (supports rgba).","valueType":"string"},{"name":"shadowBlur","label":"Display · Shadow blur (when drop shadow on)","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":4,"description":"Blur radius of the drop shadow, in pixels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"hoverHighlight","label":"Display · Hover highlight","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Highlight a column on mouse-over.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"hoverColor","label":"Display · Hover color (when hover highlight on)","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"Color a column turns on hover. Blank = automatically brighten the column's own color.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"hoverDimOthers","label":"Display · Dim others on hover","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"description":"Fade the other columns when hovering one, so the hovered column stands out.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"animate","label":"Display · Animate","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Animate columns growing in on first render and on data change.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"animationDuration","label":"Display · Animation duration (ms)","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":800,"description":"Duration of the grow-in animation in milliseconds.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"animationEasing","label":"Display · Animation easing","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"Linear","value":"linear"},{"label":"Cubic out","value":"cubicOut"},{"label":"Cubic in-out","value":"cubicInOut"},{"label":"Quad out","value":"quadOut"},{"label":"Exp out","value":"expOut"},{"label":"Back out","value":"backOut"},{"label":"Bounce out","value":"bounceOut"},{"label":"Elastic out","value":"elasticOut"}]},"defaultValue":"cubicOut","description":"Easing curve for the grow-in animation.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"animationStagger","label":"Display · Animation stagger (ms)","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":0,"description":"Delay between categories for a cascade grow-in (0 = all bars animate together).","valueType":"string"},{"name":"fontFamily","label":"Display · Base font family","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"CSS font-family for chart text that doesn't have its own family set. Blank = inherit from the page.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"useSeriesColors","label":"Colors · Use per-series colors","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Use each series' own 'color' field when present. Falls back to the palette otherwise.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"colorScheme","label":"Colors · Color scheme","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"Custom (use palette)","value":"custom"},{"label":"Category10","value":"category10"},{"label":"Tableau10","value":"tableau10"},{"label":"Set2","value":"set2"},{"label":"Set3","value":"set3"},{"label":"Paired","value":"paired"},{"label":"Dark2","value":"dark2"},{"label":"Pastel1","value":"pastel1"},{"label":"Accent","value":"accent"}]},"defaultValue":"custom","description":"Pick a built-in D3 categorical scheme to color the series, or Custom to use the Color palette below. Per-series colors in the data still win when 'Use per-series colors' is on.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"colorPalette","label":"Colors · Color palette","fieldType":"json","description":"JSON array of CSS colors used per series when 'Use per-series colors' is off and Color scheme is Custom, e.g. [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"].","valueType":"string"},{"name":"barFillStyle","label":"Colors · Bar fill style","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"Solid","value":"solid"},{"label":"Gradient","value":"gradient"},{"label":"Pattern (texture)","value":"pattern"}]},"defaultValue":"solid","description":"How each bar is filled: Solid color, a Gradient along the bar, or a colorblind-friendly Pattern (series color plus a texture that varies per series).","valueType":"string"},{"name":"xAxisLabel","label":"X-axis · Title","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"Caption beneath the x-axis. Leave blank to hide.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"xTickRotation","label":"X-axis · Tick label rotation","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":0,"description":"Rotate category-axis tick labels by this many degrees (e.g. -45 or -90) so long or dense labels don't overlap. 0 = horizontal. The chart auto-reserves space for tilted labels.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"xTickInterval","label":"X-axis · Tick label interval","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":1,"description":"Show every Nth category label (1 = all, 2 = every other, …). Bars are unaffected; only labels thin out.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"maxXTicks","label":"X-axis · Max tick labels","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":0,"description":"Cap the number of category labels shown; the chart auto-thins to roughly this many when there are more categories. 0 = no cap.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"showXGridlines","label":"X-axis · Show gridlines","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"description":"Draw gridlines along the category axis (vertical lines for columns, horizontal for bars), in addition to the value-axis gridlines.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"yAxisLabel","label":"Y-axis · Title","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"Rotated caption beside the y-axis. Leave blank to hide.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"yScaleType","label":"Y-axis · Scale type","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"Linear","value":"linear"},{"label":"Logarithmic","value":"log"},{"label":"Square root","value":"sqrt"}]},"defaultValue":"linear","description":"Linear (default), Logarithmic (for data spanning orders of magnitude; ignores zero/negatives and is best with grouped data), or Square root.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"yMin","label":"Y-axis · Minimum","fieldType":"number","description":"Fixed y-axis minimum. Leave blank for automatic.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"yMax","label":"Y-axis · Maximum","fieldType":"number","description":"Fixed y-axis maximum. Leave blank for automatic. Bars exceeding it are truncated at the top.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"clampOverflowIndicator","label":"Y-axis · Mark clipped bars","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"description":"Draw a small zigzag 'torn edge' on bars cut off by an explicit Minimum/Maximum, signaling the value extends beyond the axis.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"yTickCount","label":"Y-axis · Tick count","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":5,"description":"Approximate number of ticks/gridlines on the y-axis. Ignored when Explicit tick values is set.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"yAxisTickValues","label":"Y-axis · Explicit tick values","fieldType":"json","description":"JSON array of numbers for exact y-axis ticks/gridlines, e.g. [0, 25, 50, 75, 100]. Overrides Tick count. Blank = automatic.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"yAxisFormat","label":"Y-axis · Label format","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"D3 number format specifier for the y-axis tick labels only (e.g. \".0f\", \"$,.0f\", \".0%\"). Blank = default.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"showGridlines","label":"Y-axis · Show gridlines","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Draw horizontal gridlines at each y tick.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"gridColor","label":"Y-axis · Gridline color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"#e5e7eb","description":"Color of horizontal gridlines.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"axisColor","label":"Axes · Line color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"#6b7280","description":"Color of the x and y axis lines and tick marks.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"axisTextColor","label":"Axes · Text color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"#6b7280","description":"Text color for the x/y axis tick values and the axis titles.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"axisFontSize","label":"Axes · Font size","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":12,"description":"Font size (px) for the x/y axis tick values and the axis titles.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"axisFontFamily","label":"Axes · Font family","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"CSS font-family for the x/y axis tick values and axis titles. Blank = use the base font family.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"showLegend","label":"Legend · Show legend","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Show a legend of series names with color swatches.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"legendPosition","label":"Legend · Position","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"Top","value":"top"},{"label":"Right","value":"right"},{"label":"Bottom","value":"bottom"}]},"defaultValue":"bottom","description":"Where to place the legend.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"legendFontSize","label":"Legend · Font size","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":12,"description":"Font size (px) for the legend text.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"legendInteractive","label":"Legend · Clickable to toggle series","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":false,"description":"Let viewers click a legend item to hide/show that series; the chart rescales to the remaining series. Hidden items stay in the legend (dimmed) so they can be toggled back.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"showValueLabels","label":"Data label · Show data labels","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Draw the numeric value on each column.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"valueLabelPosition","label":"Data label · Position","fieldType":"choice","typeMetadata":{"variant":"dropdown","choices":[{"label":"Inside","value":"inside"},{"label":"Above / past end","value":"above"},{"label":"None","value":"none"}]},"defaultValue":"inside","description":"Where to draw the data labels: inside each bar, just above/past the bar's end, or hidden.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"valueLabelFormat","label":"Data label · Label format","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"D3 number format specifier for the column value labels only (e.g. \".0f\", \",.1f\", \"$,.0f\", \".2%\"). Blank = default.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"labelFontSize","label":"Data label · Font size","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":12,"description":"Font size (px) for the value labels drawn inside the columns.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"referenceLineValue","label":"Reference line · Value","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"Draw a threshold line across the plot at this value. Enter a number, or 'avg' (or 'mean') to auto-draw the average of the data. Blank = no line.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"referenceLineColor","label":"Reference line · Color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"#ef4444","description":"Color of the reference line and its label.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"referenceLineLabel","label":"Reference line · Label","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"","description":"Optional caption drawn at the end of the reference line.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"showTooltip","label":"Tooltip · Show tooltip","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Show a hover tooltip when the pointer is over a column.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"tooltipTemplate","label":"Tooltip · Template","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"<strong>{label}</strong><br/>{swatch}{seriesName}: {formattedValue}","description":"Tooltip content (light HTML allowed). Tokens: {label}, {value}, {formattedValue}, {seriesName}, {seriesIndex}, {categoryIndex}, {percent} (of category total), {swatch} (a colored dot matching the series), {color} (the series color string), and any custom key on the data point (e.g. {owner}). Interpolated values are HTML-escaped; {swatch} renders a colored dot.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"tooltipFollowCursor","label":"Tooltip · Follow cursor","fieldType":"boolean","defaultValue":true,"description":"Tooltip follows the pointer. Turn off to anchor it above the hovered column.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"tooltipBackground","label":"Tooltip · Background color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"rgba(17,24,39,0.92)","description":"Tooltip background (CSS color, supports rgba).","valueType":"string"},{"name":"tooltipTextColor","label":"Tooltip · Text color","fieldType":"string","defaultValue":"#ffffff","description":"Tooltip text color.","valueType":"string"},{"name":"tooltipFontSize","label":"Tooltip · Font size","fieldType":"number","defaultValue":12,"description":"Tooltip font size, in pixels.","valueType":"string"}]</props> <root_component>49de198a839e3ba08270e9c574ff3a78</root_component> ","axisColor":"@context/axisColor","axisTextColor":"@context/axisTextColor","axisFontSize":"@context/axisFontSize","axisFontFamily":"@context/axisFontFamily","showLegend":"@context/showLegend","legendPosition":"@context/legendPosition","legendFontSize":"@context/legendFontSize","legendInteractive":"@context/legendInteractive","showValueLabels":"@context/showValueLabels","valueLabelPosition":"@context/valueLabelPosition","valueLabelFormat":"@context/valueLabelFormat","labelFontSize":"@context/labelFontSize","referenceLineValue":"@context/referenceLineValue","referenceLineColor":"@context/referenceLineColor","referenceLineLabel":"@context/referenceLineLabel","showTooltip":"@context/showTooltip","tooltipTemplate":"@context/tooltipTemplate","tooltipFollowCursor":"@context/tooltipFollowCursor","tooltipBackground":"@context/tooltipBackground","tooltipTextColor":"@context/tooltipTextColor","tooltipFontSize":"@context/tooltipFontSize"}</root_component_config>
